source_description: Rename all active constitution references to charter across the codebase, as described in GitHub issue #379. Scope: 3 directory modules, 7 kernel API functions, 15+ classes/types, CLI command, skill, templates, and user-facing content. Must NOT rename migration files, migration tests, kitty-specs archives, changelog entries, or legacy agent configs. Must add backward-compat CLI alias. Must add migration for user projects renaming .kittify/constitution/ to .kittify/charter/.
